input.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Project Alias Configuration - Safe Version
# Sets up convenient shortcuts for common development tasks

echo "[INFO] Setting up legitimate project aliases..."

# Add useful development aliases
cat >> ~/.bashrc << 'EOF'

# ===== Project Development Aliases =====

# Git shortcuts
alias gs='git status'
alias ga='git add'
alias gc='git commit'
alias gp='git push'
alias gl='git log --oneline -10'
alias gb='git branch'
alias gco='git checkout'

# Directory navigation
alias workspace='cd /workspace'
alias scripts='cd /opt/scripts'

# Project shortcuts
alias build='npm run build'
alias test='npm test'
alias dev='npm run dev'
alias lint='npm run lint'

# Utility shortcuts
alias ll='ls -lah'
alias clear-cache='rm -rf .cache node_modules'
alias update='apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y'

# ===== End Aliases =====
EOF

echo "[SUCCESS] Safe aliases configured!"
echo "[INFO] Run 'source ~/.bashrc' to activate them"
echo "[INFO] Use 'alias' command to list all available aliases"
